title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating how to build a complete event management system with role-based access control using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video shows database structure generation, workflow automations, and permissions management without repeated AI prompts, positioning it as a cost-effective alternative to manual AI-assisted development.
